prestazioni: Engine swap to a 1UZ-FE V8 (3.0L or 4.0L variant) with forged internals including JE Pistons 9.0:1 compression forged pistons, Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft from Tomei, paired with a custom HKS GT-SS turbo kit (single turbo setup) utilizing a Garrett GTX5533R turbocharger, HKS 272-degree camshafts, and a GReddy Trust T88-34D turbo manifold for optimized exhaust flow

Full custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust system by Fujitsubo with a GReddy Revolution RS cat-back, paired with a custom equal-length stainless steel header system designed by Jun Auto for the 1UZ-FE, featuring 4-2-1 merge collectors and ceramic coating for heat management

Custom ECU tuning via Haltech Elite 2500 standalone ECU with flex-fuel capability, integrated with a Link G4+ Xtreme for advanced traction control and launch control, paired with a custom wiring harness by Wireworks Japan and a dual Bosch 044 fuel pump setup with ID1000 injectors for E85 compatibility
estetica: Full custom widebody conversion by Rocket Bunny (Pandem) specifically modified for the Century Royal chassis, including extended carbon fiber fenders, custom front and rear bumpers with integrated LED lighting by Valenti, and a custom rear diffuser by Veilside

Custom handcrafted interior by Sabelt Japan featuring full Alcantara upholstery with embroidered Century Royal crests, Recaro Pole Position seats with custom mounting brackets, and a full roll cage by AutoPower designed to retain rear passenger comfort while adding structural rigidity

Custom forged 22-inch BBS LM-R wheels in a staggered fitment (9.5J front, 11J rear) with custom offsets to clear the widebody fenders, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (265/30/22 front, 305/25/22 rear), paired with a custom air suspension system by AirREX with 3-way adjustable damping
